location: A crumbling apartment stairwell
light: Bare bulb at the top of the stairs casting a narrow cone of yellow light
dark: The steps below swallowed in near-total darkness
hook: Wrong kind of quiet.

location: Empty highway overpass at the edge of a city
light: Late sun from the right casting long orange shadows across the road surface
dark: The far end of the overpass dissolving into haze
hook: Nobody is coming back.

location: A small fishing village seen from a cliff road
light: Flat grey overcast daylight. No shadows. Everything equally visible and equally bleak.
dark: The horizon dissolved into white fog
hook: The kind of afternoon that never ends.

location: Rain-soaked back alley behind a restaurant
light: Single overhead streetlamp reflecting in a shallow puddle
dark: The far end of the alley completely black
hook: Something happened here. You can still feel it.

location: A waiting room in a provincial train station
light: Fluorescent tubes one of which is flickering
dark: The windows showing nothing but dark glass
hook: Empty. Waiting.

location: A kitchen in a terraced house after a party
light: Strip light on under the cabinets. Everything else off.
dark: The living room behind the doorway completely dark
hook: Everyone else has already left.

location: The lobby of a closed mid-range hotel
light: The reception desk lit from above by a practical lamp, warm amber
dark: The corridor behind the desk in deep shadow
hook: The decision has already been made.

location: A long institutional corridor in a hospital
light: Emergency lighting every ten meters, pools of sickly green-white
dark: The corridor bending out of sight fifty feet ahead
hook: Waiting to be told it's over.

location: A suburban bedroom, bed unmade, curtains half-drawn
light: Harsh midday sun forcing through the gap in the curtains, a single blinding stripe
dark: The rest of the room in deep shadow
hook: You can feel the absence of the person who used to be here.

location: A factory floor after the last shift
light: A few remaining overhead industrials, most switched off
dark: The machinery receding into silhouette
hook: Something is ending without ceremony.

location: A bus stop at the edge of a small town
light: The flat diffuse light of total overcast, no shadows anywhere
dark: The road disappearing into white after fifty meters
hook: Time moving at the wrong speed.

location: The back seat of a taxi on a motorway at night
light: Passing streetlights strobing across the passenger
dark: Everything outside the car impenetrably black
hook: Not the moment itself. The moment after.

location: An outdoor market just before it opens
light: Vendors setting up by battery lanterns and phone torches
dark: The sky still fully dark above
hook: The last warm day before everything gets hard.

location: A school gymnasium used as a polling station
light: Fluorescent overhead, the folding tables beneath them
dark: The bleachers pushed back into near-darkness
hook: Everyone here has a secret. Some of them are the same secret.

location: A motorway rest stop diner at the end of service
light: Counter lit from below, the coffee machine light, nothing else
dark: The booths at the far end unlit
hook: Love that doesn't know it's over yet.

location: An apartment building rooftop in summer heat
light: The city's ambient orange glow from below, no direct source
dark: The water tower casting a hard black shadow
hook: She doesn't know she's being watched.

location: The hold of a small fishing trawler
light: A single work light clamped to a beam above the catch
dark: The bilge and the far bulkheads invisible
hook: Half a life. The other half is somewhere else.

location: An empty primary school classroom
light: Afternoon sun through the tall windows, dust visible in the beams
dark: The back of the room, the cupboards, the corners in shade
hook: The architecture of a life that didn't happen.

location: A launderette on a street with no pedestrians
light: The machine windows giving off a warm intermittent glow
dark: The street outside fully dark except one streetlamp
hook: The weight of something you almost said.

location: A river bank after a flood recedes
light: Flat overcast, the sky and the mud the same grey
dark: The water still covering the far bank
hook: Not grief exactly. More like the memory of grief.

location: A military checkpoint on a back road
light: A single halogen work light on a tripod, brutal and white
dark: The surrounding countryside absolutely black
hook: The wrong person in the right place.

location: A shared bathroom in a workers' hostel
light: A single bare bulb above the mirror, slightly yellowed
dark: The shower cubicles at the back in near-darkness
hook: The kind of loneliness you chose.

location: A pier at the end of a seaside town out of season
light: The grey sea reflecting what little sky-light remains
dark: The arcade at the end of the pier unlit and shuttered
hook: Nothing about this is romantic. That's the point.

location: A bookshop cellar used for storage
light: One work light in the corner, piles of books casting irregular shadows
dark: The far end of the cellar completely unlit
hook: Something you've been pretending not to notice.

location: A car in a hospital car park
light: Grey flat daylight through a dirty windscreen
dark: The rear seats invisible from outside
hook: Waiting to be told it's over.

location: A village pub at closing time on a weeknight
light: The optic lights behind the bar, the fruit machine in the corner
dark: The far end of the bar, the snug, completely dark
hook: He came back. That's never a good sign.

location: The loading bay at the back of a supermarket
light: A dock light above the shutter door, pooling on wet concrete
dark: The car park behind it in complete darkness
hook: Pride that has nowhere to go.

location: A narrow canal at the edge of an industrial city
light: The canal surface reflecting a white sky, everything else below it dark
dark: The factory wall on the far bank a featureless black
hook: Not danger. The removal of safety.

location: A children's bedroom at dawn
light: Early light leaking under the curtains, touching the floor
dark: The bed and its occupant still in shadow
hook: The last good day.

location: A decommissioned lighthouse
light: Cold grey window-light filling the round room, no direction
dark: The staircase below the floor completely black
hook: The door was always open. Nobody ever walked through it.

location: The back corridor of a government ministry
light: Emergency exit signs and corridor fluorescents on a timer
dark: The conference rooms to either side dark and locked
hook: It would be easier if there was someone to blame.

location: A greenhouse in a suburban garden in winter
light: The last blue light from the sky coming through the dirty glass panels
dark: The interior deepening to black at floor level
hook: Comfort that feels like a trap.

location: The top floor of a car park with no cars
light: The city below providing an orange upward glow, no overhead lights
dark: The stairwell access behind the camera pitch black
hook: The moment you realize you're going to have to do this alone.

location: A long-distance overnight train, empty carriage
light: Dim floor-level courtesy lights, windows showing only reflection
dark: The end of the carriage where the toilet corridor begins
hook: The specific sadness of 3am.

location: A public library stacks, after closing
light: A single reading lamp left on at the far end of an aisle
dark: The stacks on either side floor-to-ceiling in shadow
hook: You recognize this place. You were never here before.

location: The kitchen of a restaurant on its last day of service
light: The extractor lights still on, stainless steel surfaces lit harsh white
dark: The dining room beyond the pass unlit and empty
hook: Something is ending without ceremony.

location: A stone farmhouse interior in heavy rain
light: A turf fire in the grate providing the only warm light
dark: The back of the house, the corridor, completely dark
hook: Wrong kind of quiet.

location: A motorway bridge seen from below
light: The motorway lights above creating a band of orange, spilling down the supports
dark: The ground beneath the bridge absolutely black
hook: Nobody is coming back.

location: A sports hall used as emergency accommodation
light: Camp beds under fluorescent tubes on a night setting — low, green-tinged
dark: The bleachers and the walls beyond the beds in darkness
hook: Not hopeless. Not hopeful. Something worse.

location: A village phone box, interior
light: The phone box light above — warm yellow, visible for miles outside
dark: The road outside visible only as a strip of tarmac
hook: The long pause before the confession.

location: A shuttered department store, ground floor
light: Emergency lighting only — green-white at intervals, most of the floor dark
dark: The escalators rising into blackness above
hook: The feeling of having been here before and knowing how it ends.
